label: OpenClaw / AI Agent
desc: AI Agent 框架、LLM工具调用、Agentic工作流、开源 Agent 生态动态

papers.title: Semantic Invariance in Agentic AI
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly serve as autonomous reasoning agents in decision support, scientific problem-solving, and multi-agent coordination systems. However, deploying LLM agents in consequential applications requires assurance that their reasoning remains stable under semantically equivalent input variations, a property we term semantic invariance.Standard benchmark evaluations, which assess accuracy on fixed, canonical problem formulations, fail to capture this critical reliability dimension. To address this shortcoming, in this paper we present a metamorphic testing framework for systematically assessing the robustness of LLM reasoning agents, applying eight semantic-preserving transformations (identity, paraphrase, fact reordering, expansion, contraction, academic context, business context, and contrastive formulation) across seven foundation models spanning four distinct architectural families: Hermes (70B, 405B), Qwen3 (30B-A3B, 235B-A22B), DeepSeek-R1, and gpt-oss (20B, 120B). Our evaluation encompasses 19 multi-step reasoning problems across eight scientific domains. The results reveal that model scale does not predict robustness: the smaller Qwen3-30B-A3B achieves the highest stability (79.6% invariant responses, semantic similarity 0.91), while larger models exhibit greater fragility.

papers.title: Developing and evaluating a chatbot to support maternal health care
papers.abstract: The ability to provide trustworthy maternal health information using phone-based chatbots can have a significant impact, particularly in low-resource settings where users have low health literacy and limited access to care. However, deploying such systems is technically challenging: user queries are short, underspecified, and code-mixed across languages, answers require regional context-specific grounding, and partial or missing symptom context makes safe routing decisions difficult.   We present a chatbot for maternal health in India developed through a partnership between academic researchers, a health tech company, a public health nonprofit, and a hospital. The system combines (1) stage-aware triage, routing high-risk queries to expert templates, (2) hybrid retrieval over curated maternal/newborn guidelines, and (3) evidence-conditioned generation from an LLM. Our core contribution is an evaluation workflow for high-stakes deployment under limited expert supervision. Targeting both component-level and end-to-end testing, we introduce: (i) a labeled triage benchmark (N=150) achieving 86.7% emergency recall, explicitly reporting the missed-emergency vs. over-escalation trade-off; (ii) a synthetic multi-evidence retrieval benchmark (N=100) with chunk-level evidence labels; (iii) LLM-as-judge comparison on real queries (N=781) using clinician-codesigned criteria; and (iv) expert validation. Our findings show that trustworthy medical assistants in multilingual, noisy settings require defense-in-depth design paired with multi-method evaluation, rather than any single model and evaluation method choice.

hot_topics.title: An AI agent published a hit piece on me
hot_topics.author: scottshambaugh
hot_topics.comment: Agent 自主发布针对用户的负面报道，引发社区对「Agent 是否应有写作和发布权限」的强烈争议，是今年最受关注的 Agent 失控事件。
hot_topics.title_zh: 一个AI Agent给我写了负面文章

hot_topics.title: Opus 4.5 is not the normal AI agent experience that I have had thus far
hot_topics.author: tbassetto
hot_topics.comment: 用户深度实测 Claude Opus 4.5 的 Agent 能力，认为其自主规划和工具调用表现已明显超出此前所有模型，评论区汇集大量一手使用反馈。
hot_topics.title_zh: Opus 4.5 的 Agent 体验与以往截然不同

hot_topics.title: AI agent opens a PR write a blogpost to shames the maintainer who closes it
hot_topics.author: wrxd
hot_topics.comment: Agent 在开源社区自主行动引发维护者冲突，暴露出 Agent 在协作场景中的边界模糊问题，对开源社区治理提出新挑战。
hot_topics.title_zh: AI Agent 发 PR、写博客羞辱关闭该 PR 的维护者

hot_topics.title: Claws are now a new layer on top of LLM agents
hot_topics.author: Cyphase
hot_topics.comment: 提出在现有 LLM Agent 之上增加「Claws」编排层的架构思路，评论区对 Agent 分层设计和职责边界展开深入技术辩论。
hot_topics.title_zh: Claws：LLM Agent 之上的新抽象层

hot_topics.title: An AI agent published a hit piece on me – more things have happened
hot_topics.author: scottshambaugh
hot_topics.comment: 首篇事件的跟进报道，当事人详述后续发展，揭示 Agent 自主行为在现实世界中引发的连锁反应与平台责任讨论。
hot_topics.title_zh: AI Agent 负面文章事件后续

hot_topics.title: Gemini 2.0: our new AI model for the agentic era
hot_topics.author: meetpateltech
hot_topics.comment: 谷歌发布 Gemini 2.0，重点强化多步推理和工具调用能力，评论区对其与 GPT-4o 的横向对比及实际 Agent 场景表现讨论热烈。
hot_topics.title_zh: Gemini 2.0：为 Agentic 时代打造的新模型

trending_repos.name: msitarzewski/agency-agents
trending_repos.desc: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
trending_repos.comment: 一站式 AI 中介平台，集成前端界面与后端 Agent 编排，本周新增 3.4 万 star，是当前增速最快的 Agent 框架之一，适合快速搭建业务自动化产品。

trending_repos.name: 666ghj/MiroFish
trending_repos.desc: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物
trending_repos.comment: 通用群体智能引擎，基于鱼群等仿生算法实现多 Agent 协同与路径预测，本周增 1.9 万 star，在 Agent 调度领域提供了不同于传统 LLM 框架的新思路。

trending_repos.name: microsoft/BitNet
trending_repos.comment: 微软开源的 1-bit 大模型推理框架，大幅降低本地部署显存需求，是端侧 AI Agent 落地的关键基础设施，本周持续受到关注。

trending_repos.name: promptfoo/promptfoo
trending_repos.desc: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.
trending_repos.comment: 专为 Prompt、Agent 和 RAG 设计的测试与红队工具，支持自动化安全评估和性能基准，是生产环境 Agent 质量保障的实用工程工具。

trending_repos.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
trending_repos.desc: The agent that grows with you
trending_repos.comment: Nous Research 推出的自适应 Agent 框架，强调随使用自动成长优化，本周增 5000+ star，定位介于通用 Agent 框架与个性化助手之间。
